summary:
The zone of stimulation involves cells responsible for bone turnover such as osteoblasts and osteoclasts, but excludes processes themselves like new bone formation which are outcomes of their activity. \boxed{New Bone Formation}

The summary captures the essence of what occurs versus an outcome in the context provided while focusing directly on answering why one option doesn't belong among typical cellular functions found there. It maintains clarity about core elements without extraneous details unnecessary for this specific query resolution task at hand regarding identifying exceptions based upon functional roles vs results produced therein.
